comment: Mean Green has completely transformed my jungle of a backyard to a peaceful sanctuary. I'm so grateful. Now I will be able to maintain it myself. They were very professional and fast in getting the work done, always with my wants and needs priority. Thank you Evelin and Denise. I so appreciate you both. And don't forget the hardworking crew.
draft_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, Susie. Knowing that the lawn care service met your expectations reinforces the standards we hold every crew to. We appreciate your trust in Black Hill Landscaping.
